title: $$$ Willing to pay someone to develop a MeshCore firmware for my LilyGo T-Watch S3

messages.author: wolfito
messages.text: Hey there I purchased a couple of these watches to use on MeshCore and I've noticed there's no current firmware available for it. So I am willing to pay someone for this to be developed. Please send me a direct message if you are capable of doing so, thank you very much.
messages.content_html: Hey there I purchased a couple of these watches to use on MeshCore and I've noticed there's no current firmware available for it. So I am willing to pay someone for this to be developed. Please send me a direct message if you are capable of doing so, thank you very much.
